topic: Employee contracts stored in a drawer — why that matters far more than most owners realise
format: Open with a question that forces the reader to calculate their own answer — time lost, money wasted, or risk carried
post:
When did you last check every employee contract in your business — and actually find them all?

Most owners I talk to go quiet at that question.

One contract lives in a folder on someone's desktop. Another was signed on paper and stuffed in a drawer two years ago. A third? Nobody's quite sure.

It feels like a minor admin thing. It's not.

A missing or outdated contract leaves you exposed — Ministry of Labour disputes, end-of-service gratuity miscalculations, WPS payroll discrepancies, Omanisation records that fall apart under review. These aren't hypotheticals. They're the calls people don't see coming.

And when something goes wrong, you're not just hunting for paperwork. You're doing it while an employee is standing there watching.

A better filing cabinet won't solve this.

What actually solves it is having every contract — signed, version-controlled, tied to each employee's profile — in one place. With reminders before renewals lapse. With e-signature built in so nothing slips through unsigned.

That's what SmartPRO Hub does. HR software built for Oman businesses, with MOL compliance, WPS, and SPF handled from the start.

From OMR 12/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card needed.
